name: Hotkey Bar
description: Function key shortcut bar inspired by DOS/Norton Commander style interfaces.
visual_brief: Fixed horizontal bar at the bottom of the viewport displaying function key shortcuts in a DOS/Norton Commander style. Each slot shows a function key label (F1, F2, ... F10) in a highlighted badge followed by the action name (Help, Menu, View, Edit, Copy, Move, Mkdir, Delete, etc.). Background is typically dark with bright key labels. Extended preset adds Shift+F and Ctrl+F combinations as additional rows. The bar spans the full viewport width with evenly distributed key slots.

responsive.mobile: Bar shows only the most critical shortcuts (F1-F5). Remaining keys accessible via a more button. Key labels use abbreviated action names.
responsive.tablet: Full F1-F10 bar visible. Key slots slightly narrower.
responsive.desktop: Full bar with all function keys and comfortable spacing. Extended preset shows additional modifier combinations.
